    Idaho Senior Living Facilities & Care Homes

    62 senior living communities in Idaho. Pick your region - each color on the map is one region - and browse its communities city by city.

    What's available in Idaho

    • Assisted Living - 36
    • Skilled Nursing - 26
    • Memory Care - 24
    • Independent Living - 15
    • Respite Care - 6
    • Small Care Home - 6
    • CCRC / Life Plan - 1

    How Idaho regulates senior care

    Residential assisted living facilities are licensed by the Bureau of Facility Standards; very small settings operate as Certified Family Homes. Lookup: Idaho Department of Health and Welfare, Bureau of Facility Standards.

    Idaho money questions

    • What senior living costs in Idaho
    • Does Idaho Medicaid pay for senior care?

    Browse Idaho by region

    • Treasure Valley & Southwest

      26 communities

      Boise, Caldwell, Eagle, Emmett, Fruitland, Meridian, Nampa

    • Eastern Idaho & Magic Valley

      20 communities

      Blackfoot, Burley, Idaho Falls, Kimberly, Pocatello, Rexburg, Twin Falls

    • North Idaho

      14 communities

      Coeur d'Alene, Lewiston, Moscow, Post Falls, Sandpoint, Silverton

    • Other Areas

      2 communities

      Grangeville, Weiser

    • Privacy Policy

    Senior Living Community is an independent information resource for families, and the resident's quality of life comes first here - then the family, then the facility. We are not a referral service and do not provide medical, legal, or financial advice - for decisions about care, consult the professionals involved. Facility details change; always confirm directly with a community. Listings are never paid placements. Last data review: 2026-07-11. Run a senior living community? Claim your free listing or see our marketing services for communities. Terms · Privacy.
